controls.title: System configuration standards address all known vulnerabilities
controls.evidence: IaC scan of Terraform templates completed 2026-03-14. No misconfigurations detected in security group rules, IAM policies, or storage encryption settings.

controls.title: Primary account number secured wherever stored
controls.evidence: SAST scan confirmed all database write operations for PAN fields use AES-256 encryption. No plaintext PAN storage detected in 3 scans over the reporting period.

controls.title: Strong cryptography protects PAN during transmission
controls.evidence: DAST scan confirmed TLS 1.2+ on all endpoints handling cardholder data. No insecure cipher suites detected.

controls.title: Software engineering techniques prevent common coding vulnerabilities
controls.evidence: SAST scan identified 7 findings across injection categories.

controls.title: Security vulnerabilities identified and managed
controls.evidence: SCA scan identified 14 dependencies with known CVEs. 3 are critical severity.

controls.title: User authentication managed with strong authentication
controls.evidence: Secrets scan detected a hardcoded API key in deployment script.

controls.title: Internal vulnerability scans performed
controls.evidence: 12 SAST scans, 4 DAST scans, 8 SCA scans, and 12 secrets scans completed during the reporting period. Scan schedule: SAST weekly, DAST monthly, SCA weekly, secrets on every commit.
